name: @metorial/zenrows
description: Scrape and extract data from public websites. Fetch page content from any URL with JavaScript rendering, anti-bot bypass, CAPTCHA solving, and premium proxy rotation. Extract structured data using CSS selectors or auto-parsing. Capture screenshots, render pages as Markdown, plain text, or PDF. Target requests from 190+ countries using geolocation. Scrape structured product data from e-commerce platforms like Amazon and Walmart, real estate listings from Zillow and Idealista, and Google search results. Supports session management, device emulation, custom headers, and JavaScript instructions for page interaction.
